Research

Preprints and Publications

  • Kirillov’s conjecture on Hecke–Grothendieck polynomials with Ben Brubaker, Michael Hu, Nupur Jain, Yifan Li, Yi Lin, Maria Mihaila, Van Tran, and I. Deniz Ünel. Submitted, 2024. arXiv:2410.07960.

  • The three gap theorem and periodic functions with A. Hermida and Tian An Wong. Integers, volume 22: #A21 (11 pp.), 2022. arXiv:2202.05921.

In Preparation
